item.title: 2026 NFL Coaching/GM Tracker: Chiefs Tab Former Cowboys Star as RB Coach
item.description: The coaching carousel for the 2026 offseason continues to churn. Here are the latest news and rumors from around the NFL!

item.title: UFC CEO Dana White on Ram Return to NASCAR Truck Series: 'I Love Challenges'
item.description: UFC CEO Dana White discussed the role he played in getting Ram back in the NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series.

item.title: 2026 Daytona 500: Everything To Know About The Great American Race
item.description: What time is the race? How many laps are there? Which drivers are the favorites? Here's everything to know about the 2026 Daytona 500.

item.title: Jimmie Johnson's Final NASCAR Cup Race: 2027 Daytona 500 Will Be His Last
item.description: The seven-time NASCAR Cup Series champ will run his last Daytona 500 in 2027.

item.title: Daytona 500 Weather: Forecast for Sunday's Race at Daytona International Speedway
item.description: Here's the projected weather for the 2026 Daytona 500 to kick off the NASCAR Cup Series season.
